# templates

DOT workflow definitions ([epic-runner.dot](./epic-runner.dot), [plan-to-execute.dot](./plan-to-execute.dot)) and markdown schema templates ([prd-template.md](./prd-template.md), [spec-template.md](./spec-template.md)) for Pipeline Automation System (PAS). [epic-runner.dot](./epic-runner.dot) orchestrates autonomous `bd` CLI task execution via conditional state machine. [plan-to-execute.dot](./plan-to-execute.dot) transforms features into validated beads pipelines. [prd-template.md](./prd-template.md) and [spec-template.md](./spec-template.md) standardize requirements documents for `pas decompose` consumption.

## Contents

### Execution Workflows

[epic-runner.dot](./epic-runner.dot) — Digraph `EpicRunner` with `model="sonnet"` orchestrating autonomous child task processing via conditional nodes `pick_task` (`llm_model="haiku"`, `allowed_tools="Bash(bd:*)"`), `investigate` (`allowed_tools="Read,Grep,Glob,Bash(bd:*)"`), `implement`, `run_tests`, `verify` (`node_type="conditional"`), `fixup`, `close_task` (`allowed_tools="Bash(bd:*),Bash(git:*)"`), `check_remaining` (`llm_model="haiku"`, `loop_restart=true`). Manages state artifacts `.pas/current_task.md`, `.pas/investigation.md`, `.pas/test-results.md` via conditional routing edges `condition="preferred_label=MORE"`, `condition="preferred_label=DONE"`, `condition="preferred_label=PASS"`, `condition="preferred_label=FAIL"`.

[plan-to-execute.dot](./plan-to-execute.dot) — Meta-pipeline digraph with `model="sonnet"` and nodes `generate_prd` (`allowed_tools="Write"`), `review_prd` (`shape="hexagon"`), `generate_spec` (`allowed_tools="Read,Write"`), `review_spec` (`shape="hexagon"`), `decompose` (`allowed_tools="Read,Write,Bash(bd:*)"`), `scaffold` (`allowed_tools="Read,Write,Bash(sed:*)"`), `validate_pipeline` (`allowed_tools="Bash(pas:*)"`), `execute_pipeline` (`allowed_tools="Bash(pas:*),Bash(bd:*)"`). Scaffolds pipeline DOT files via `sed 's/EPIC_ID/<epic-id>/g' templates/epic-runner.dot > .pas/pipeline.dot` with transitions routing on `condition="preferred_label=reject"` or `condition="preferred_label=continue"`.

### Document Schemas

[prd-template.md](./prd-template.md) — PRD schema requiring frontmatter `Status: Draft|In Review|Approved`, `Beads Epic` ID, `US-N` user stories (`As a [role/user type], I want to [action/capability] so that I can [benefit/outcome]`), `FR-N` functional requirements, `YYYY-MM-DD` date format.

[spec-template.md](./spec-template.md) — Technical specification template integrating with `pas decompose` CLI, defining `[T{phase}-{number}]` task ID format (e.g., `[T1-1]`, `[T2-1]`), Implementation Phases sections for beads epic generation, and `- [ ]` acceptance criteria checklists.

[pas.md](./pas.md) — DOT syntax documentation defining CLI commands `pas validate`, `pas run`, `pas info`, `pas plan`, `pas generate`, `pas decompose`, `pas scaffold`. Documents node attributes `llm_model`, `allowed_tools`, `max_budget_usd`, `goal_gate=true`, `retry_target`, shape conventions (`Mdiamond`, `Msquare`, `hexagon`, `parallelogram`), `PASS`/`FAIL` routing requirements.

[beads.md](./beads.md) — Empty stub template for beads epic initialization.

## Workflow Architecture

**Plan-to-Execute Meta-Pipeline**: `plan-to-execute.dot` chains `generate_prd` → `review_prd` → `generate_spec` → `review_spec` → `decompose` → `scaffold` → `validate_pipeline` → `execute_pipeline`. `generate_prd` writes `.pas/prd.md` using `prd-template.md` structure via `allowed_tools="Write"`. `generate_spec` writes `.pas/spec.md` using `spec-template.md` via `allowed_tools="Read,Write"`. `decompose` executes `bd create --type=epic`, `bd create --type=task`, `bd dep add <task-id> <phase-epic>`, writing root epic ID to `.pas/epic_id.txt`, using `allowed_tools="Read,Write,Bash(bd:*)"`. `scaffold` substitutes `EPIC_ID` into `epic-runner.dot` generating `.pas/pipeline.dot` via `allowed_tools="Read,Write,Bash(sed:*)"`. `validate_pipeline` runs `pas validate .pas/pipeline.dot` via `allowed_tools="Bash(pas:*)"`. `execute_pipeline` invokes `pas run .pas/pipeline.dot -w .` via `allowed_tools="Bash(pas:*),Bash(bd:*)"`.

**Epic Execution Pipeline**: `epic-runner.dot` implements `pick_task` (`llm_model="haiku"`, queries `bd show EPIC_ID`, `bd ready` via `allowed_tools="Bash(bd:*)"`) → `investigate` (restricted to `Read,Grep,Glob,Bash(bd:*)"`) → `implement` → `run_tests` → `verify` (diamond conditional with `node_type="conditional"`) → `close_task` (executes `bd close <task-id> --reason='Implemented successfully'`, `git add -A`, `git commit` via `allowed_tools="Bash(bd:*),Bash(git:*)"`) → `check_remaining` (`llm_model="haiku"`, `loop_restart=true`, cycles to `pick_task` on `condition="preferred_label=MORE"`, exits on `condition="preferred_label=DONE"`).

## Behavioral Contracts

**Conditional Routing Syntax**: DOT edges require `condition="preferred_label=MORE"` routing to `investigate`/`pick_task`, `condition="preferred_label=DONE"` routing to terminal `done`, `condition="preferred_label=PASS"` routing to `close_task`, `condition="preferred_label=FAIL"` routing to `fixup`. Human gates (`shape="hexagon"`) emit `continue`/`reject`. Verify nodes must output `PASS` or `FAIL` on final line for `node_type="conditional"` routing.

**Node Shape Conventions**: `Mdiamond` designates start node. `Msquare` designates terminal done node. `shape="diamond"` with `node_type="conditional"` enables LLM-based routing decisions. `shape="hexagon"` indicates human review gates. `shape="parallelogram"` with `tool_command` executes shell commands.

**Task ID Format**: Implementation phases use `[T{phase}-{number}]` pattern (e.g., `[T1-1]`, `[T2-3]`) parsed by `bd decompose` to generate beads task hierarchies with dependency links.

**User Story Template**: Strict format `As a [role/user type], I want to [action/capability] so that I can [benefit/outcome]` required in PRD documents.

**Date and Status Formats**: `Created` field uses `YYYY-MM-DD`. `Status` enum constrained to `Draft`, `In Review`, `Approved`.

**CLI Integration Patterns**: `bd show EPIC_ID` enumerates child tasks. `bd ready` lists available tasks. `bd update <task-id> --status=in_progress` activates tasks. `bd close <task-id> --reason='Implemented successfully'` completes tasks. `bd sync --flush-only` synchronizes state. `pas validate` checks DOT syntax. `pas run pipelines/<name>.dot -w .` executes workflows. `pas decompose .pas/spec.md` splits specifications into beads epics using Implementation Phases sections.

**Tool Whitelists**: Investigation nodes restricted to `Read,Grep,Glob,Bash(bd:*)`. Task management nodes permit `Bash(bd:*)`. Closure nodes add `Bash(git:*)`. PRD generation uses `Write`. Spec generation uses `Read,Write`. Scaffolding uses `Bash(sed:*)`. Pipeline validation uses `Bash(pas:*)`. Pipeline execution uses `Bash(pas:*),Bash(bd:*)`.

## Reproduction-Critical Constants

Full prompt template text for `epic-runner.dot` nodes: [epic-runner.annex.sum](./epic-runner.annex.sum)

Full prompt template text for `plan-to-execute.dot` nodes: [plan-to-execute.annex.sum](./plan-to-execute.annex.sum)

## File Relationships

`plan-to-execute.dot` references `templates/prd-template.md` for PRD structure, `templates/spec-template.md` for specification format, and `templates/epic-runner.dot` as scaffolding source. `epic-runner.dot` reads/writes `.pas/current_task.md` (active task state), `.pas/investigation.md` (analysis results), `.pas/test-results.md` (validation output). `spec-template.md` integrates with `pas decompose` command consuming Implementation Phases sections. `prd-template.md` frontmatter links generated beads epic IDs via `Beads Epic` field.
